demo_persona: Maya (football fan, $50 ETH on Coinbase, no Sui wallet)

findings.title: redeem / redeem_no (basic, no-streak) have 0 test coverage but are demo-critical
findings.expected: 1 happy-path + 3 abort tests per function (mirror redeem_with_streak shape)
findings.suggested_fix: Add redeem_yes_happy_path, redeem_yes_on_no_market_aborts, redeem_on_disputed_market_aborts tests. None requires DeepBook.

findings.title: Docs advertise a `merge` function that doesn't exist on-chain
findings.demo_impact: judges may flag the gap (UI gracefully degrades)
findings.expected: Either implement merge_shares<Q>(market, yes_coin, no_coin, ctx) or update docs
findings.actual: Contract has mint_shares (split) only. No merge function. Web UI has 'mergeCollateral' button that scrolls to trade card instead.
findings.suggested_fix: Update docs/architecture.md row 65 from 'merge' to 'redeem' with footnote. Long-term: implement merge_shares.

findings.title: Duplicate `use std::vector` and `use std::option` imports at file bottom
findings.suggested_fix: Delete the duplicate block. Top-of-file imports cover the test helpers.

findings.title: Abort codes skip E2 (E0, E1, _, E3)
findings.demo_impact: low (no impact unless E2 is added later)
findings.suggested_fix: Renumber EInsufficientAvailable to 2 and add a comment explaining the gap (or fill the gap intentionally).

findings.title: All 10 DeepBook-trading public functions are untested
findings.reason: Each requires a real Pool<YES<Q>, Q> from pool::create_permissionless_pool with a Coin<DEEP> fee. new_market_for_testing fabricates a zero pool_id.
findings.demo_impact: Any regression in place_order would only surface at the next maker cron tick.
findings.suggested_fix: Either accept and document the gap, or invest in a deepbook_test_helpers crate.

findings.title: mint_shares is demo-critical but has 0 test coverage
findings.demo_impact: agents index MintedEvent from this — a typo in the event fields would break position indexer

findings.title: claim_prize has 0 happy-path test (ed25519 signature path)
findings.demo_impact: weekly prize cron would silently fail with EInvalidSignature on a build_claim_message regression
findings.test_file_comment: We exercise every abort that doesn't require a real ed25519 signature. The signature path is covered by an integration smoke test in apps/agents (off-chain signer + Sui verifier).
findings.suggested_fix: Fabricate an ed25519 keypair in the test scenario, sign the canonical message, call claim_prize. ~10 LoC.

findings.title: EMarketDisputed abort path is untested (parlay+dispute interaction)
findings.demo_impact: parlay with a disputed leg silently aborts in prod; no test pins the invariant

findings.title: withdraw_settled / cancel_all_orders have 0 tests
findings.suggested_fix: Add a test asserting cancel_all_orders on a resolved market succeeds (the contract doesn't gate it on resolved).

findings.title: resolve_market requires clock even when expiry_ms == 0
findings.note: Test file uses fresh_market(expiry_ms=0) to bypass clock. Worth a doc comment.
findings.suggested_fix: Add comment in fresh_market helper explaining the convention.

findings.title: dispute_market state machine is irreversible except via creator
findings.note: Once disputed=true, only resolve_dispute (creator-only) clears it. No admin or community-cure path.

findings.title: Default distribution pays only top-4 (ranks 5-10 = 0%)
findings.suggested_fix: Consider a wider default post-hackathon. set_distribution admin can fix per-pool.

findings.title: Dead `let _ = registry; prev_streak;` bindings in record_participation
findings.suggested_fix: Delete the dead code and the comment.

findings.title: AgentPolicy has `store` ability but is only ever share_object'd
findings.suggested_fix: Remove `store` if no transfer path is planned; or document why it's kept.

findings.title: Vault has no partial-withdraw path (withdraw requires burning full vlp coin)
findings.note: SDK builder does the split-PTB. Not a bug — tested.

findings.title: set_distribution overwrites with no event emitted
Zero on-chain R-N audit-fix comments (only in tests/ and SDK)
findings.suggested_fix: Add // R-N audit fix: <summary> comments at the top of key functions.

findings.title: authorize_spend debits budget before the actual downstream call
findings.note: If downstream call fails, budget is permanently consumed. SDK wraps both in a single PTB, so this is safe in practice. Worth a doc comment.

checked_but_not_flagged: Linter warnings: 14 suppressed (unused_use x2 unique lints)
Capability patterns: every privileged fn checks ctx.sender() == admin or accepts a cap
Replay protection: claim_prize (week, user), record_participation (day_index), dispute_market (count==0)
Event emission: every state-mutating fn emits an event (except set_distribution, see MOVE-GAP-16)
Dispute state machine: set on dispute_market, cleared on resolve_dispute, checked on redeem + parlay::record_leg
Cross-module invariants: all have at least one test
pre_demo_checklist: BLOCKER: add 2 happy-path tests for redeem / redeem_no (basic) in tests/prediction_market_tests.move (MOVE-GAP-01)
BLOCKER: update docs/architecture.md:65 and docs/demo-script.md:25,52 to reflect that merge is the post-resolution redeem (MOVE-GAP-02)
COSMETIC: remove duplicate use std::vector / use std::option imports at prediction_market.move:1048-1049 (MOVE-GAP-03)
COSMETIC: renumber vault abort codes to drop the E2 gap (MOVE-GAP-04)
COSMETIC: strip dead let _ bindings in streak_system.move:308-313 (MOVE-GAP-13)
